target_area.description: Conclusion second paragraph gate-audit closing sentence and adjacent Limitations/page-10 flow

change_summary: Replaced the Conclusion's long second paragraph with a shorter four-gate closing sentence.
Removed the rendered page-9 splits where 'intervention au-' and 'visual compar-' weakened the final takeaway.
Kept the same gate semantics while making the closing sentence more compact and ACL-like.

observations: Before: page 9 rendered 'This paper makes that intervention au-' followed by 'ditable' and 'visual compar-' followed by 'ison'.
After: page 9 renders 'We make the intervention auditable with four gates: render similarity, grounding QA, material-risk bins, and embodied smoke tests.' without the old split words.
Conclusion remains contained in the left column; Limitations still starts at the top of the right column.
Page 10 Figure 4, Ethical Considerations, and References remain visually stable after the localized compaction.
visual_review.rejected_intermediate: An initial longer rewrite removed the target split words but pushed the Conclusion's final two lines into the top of the right column; it was rejected before final verification.

verification.command: rg -n "Overfull|Float too large|too large|LaTeX Warning: Float|Rerun to get|Warning:.*Label|Undefined references|multiply defined|Package lineno Warning" paper/venues/acl27/build/main.log || true

verification.evidence: ok=true; title and abstract match metadata; abstract_word_count=169

verification.command: rg -n "This paper makes that intervention|visual compar-|auditable with four gates|render similarity|Portable assets are useful only inside|portable assets are useful only inside|au-" tmp/acl_main_visual_iter_20260606_round33_current/page9.txt tmp/acl_main_visual_iter_20260606_round33_after/pages9_10.txt || true
verification.evidence: Current page 9 text contains the old 'intervention au-' and 'visual compar-' splits; after pages 9-10 text contains 'four gates: render similarity, grounding QA,' and 'Portable assets are useful only inside the gates'.

workspace_note: The repository had unrelated pre-existing modified paper, docs, evidence, figure, and test files before this round. This evidence record only claims the round33 Conclusion gate-close polish plus the new record/evidence files.
